decision: Use exact Chromium/Chrome Stable tag refs/tags/150.0.7871.101 as the high-water M150 desktop stable source baseline; record Linux-published 150.0.7871.100 as cross-platform drift evidence.
source: Chromium strategy audit: Chrome desktop Stable observed as 150.0.7871.100/.101; Gitiles tag 150.0.7871.101 commit 51b83660c3609f271ccbbd65785bf7e50a21312d is selected as single source ref.

acquisition.method: depot_tools fetch --git-cache chromium; checkout selected_ref; gclient sync; gclient runhooks
acquisition.cache_policy: Use external GIT_CACHE_PATH and Chromium out/ directories; never commit src/out/build outputs.

open_blockers: Chromium source checkout not present locally
No detector evidence for selected ref
